[[Corporal/Legends|Corporal]] '''Grenwick''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Death Star Trooper/Legends|Death Star trooper]] who served as a guard and interrogator aboard [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
[[File:Interrogation_techs.png|left|thumb|Enfield and Grenwick accompany Vader to interrogate Leia]]
In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], Grenwick acted as [[Sergeant major/Legends|Sergeant Major]] [[Enfield]]'s tactical advisor and coordinated the service schedule of the detention block. He was an interrogation technician and was present when [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] interrogated and tortured [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] of [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] in her cell.<ref name="ANH" />

Not too long after, the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]] saw its destruction in the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].<ref name="ANH" />
